# Golden WAV files for test_golden_rx
# Generated by: build/Release/gen_golden.exe golden
# Encoder:      ft8_lib ft8_encode / ft4_encode via synth_fsk
# Sample rate:  6000 Hz (firmware native rate) — see notes below, 16-bit mono PCM
# Amplitude:    0.5 (headroom for decoder; no noise added)
# Padding:      0.5 s silence before and after the signal
#
# NOTE: ft4_cq_w6dvn_dm04.wav is at 12 kHz (recorded from device).
#   The test harness auto-detects and re-initializes the monitor.
#   If decode fails, resample to 6 kHz: sox ft4_cq_w6dvn_dm04.wav -r 6000 temp.wav && mv temp.wav ft4_cq_w6dvn_dm04.wav
#
# To regenerate (run from the build directory):
#   Windows: .\Release\gen_golden.exe ..\golden
#   Linux:   ./gen_golden ../golden
# Then commit the updated WAV files.
#
# For WSJT-X / Audacity compatibility (12 kHz), downsample with sox:
#   sox <file>.wav -r 12000 <file>_12k.wav
#
# filename                       protocol  message              base_hz
ft8_w1abc_k9xyz_rr73.wav         FT8       W1ABC K9XYZ RR73     1500
ft8_cq_w1xyz_fn42.wav            FT8       CQ W1XYZ FN42        1500
ft8_w1abc_k9xyz_neg12.wav        FT8       W1ABC K9XYZ -12      1500
ft8_w1abc_k9xyz_fn42.wav         FT8       W1ABC K9XYZ FN42     1500
ft4_w1abc_k9xyz_rr73.wav         FT4       W1ABC K9XYZ RR73     1500
ft4_cq_w1xyz_fn42.wav            FT4       CQ W1XYZ FN42        1500
ft4_w1abc_k9xyz_neg12.wav        FT4       W1ABC K9XYZ -12      1500
ft4_cq_w6dvn_dm04.wav            FT4       CQ W6DVN DM04        1500
